understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem (+) by falling through passages after horizontal moves, while avoiding spikes (u/v) and using clicks to remove breakable blocks (x) that block paths.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x-position then applies gravity until landing on solids, spikes, or goal. Clicks remove targeted x tiles without moving. Gravity direction (DOWN/UP) determines fall axis. Spikes kill instantly on landing. Moves count down from 50 per attempt; UNDO can revert prior actions for recovery.
